addons.name: Metadata Privacy
addons.description: Inspect, strip, and selectively preserve metadata for share-safe derivatives.

settings_schema.label: Backend
settings_schema.description: Execution backend label surfaced in the admin console.

settings_schema.label: Device
settings_schema.description: Reserved for future metadata backends.

settings_schema.label: Output Format
settings_schema.description: Output format used for sanitized derivatives.

settings_schema.label: Max Input Size
settings_schema.description: Largest input dimension processed before export.

settings_schema.label: Concurrency
settings_schema.description: Reserved queue concurrency for future worker-backed execution.

settings_schema.label: Retention Policy
settings_schema.description: How sanitized exports and reports are retained.

settings_schema.description: Largest input dimension processed before export.

settings_schema.label: Concurrency

settings_schema.label: Retention Policy
